item.title: v0.5.0
item.description: Headline: drag-installed builds learn about new releases on their own. See the release notes for the full changelog.

item.title: v0.5.1
item.description:
Maintenance release. v0.5.0 set up the in-app updater pipeline, but the `publish-appcast.yml` workflow had an `awk -v` splice that BSD awk choked on for any release body longer than one line, so the v0.5.0 entry never made it into the appcast automatically (it had to be backfilled by hand).
v0.5.1 swaps the splice for a `grep`/`head`/`tail` approach that handles arbitrary release-note content, and is the first release that exercises the full automated chain end-to-end.
## 🛠️ Internal
- `scripts/update-appcast.sh`: replace `awk -v` with a line-number-based splice; the multi-line release body now feeds through cleanly.
## Updating
If you're already on v0.5.0, click **Check for Updates…** under the Notchify menubar icon — Sparkle picks up v0.5.1 automatically.
## Fresh install
Download `Notchify-0.5.1.dmg`, drag to Applications, then:
```sh xattr -d com.apple.quarantine /Applications/Notchify.app ```

item.title: v0.5.2
item.description:
What's new in v0.5.2

Agent integrations

  • New: Pi integration. Drop-in extension for the Pi coding harness that fires a notch notification when the agent finishes its work (agent_end). Debounces within 5 seconds so multi-turn prompts don't spam, and reads tmux session:window for disambiguated titles. Install from the menubar Integrations → Pi, or run notchify-recipes install pi.

CLI & menus

  • "Install CLI" now symlinks both notchify and notchify-recipes into /usr/local/bin.
  • Fixed: CLI install button works correctly when the daemon is run via swift run or swift build debug layouts.
  • Fixed: Installed-state detection now rejects dangling symlinks — stale broken symlinks no longer block re-install.

Internal

  • Pi recipe added to the Integrations menu alongside Claude Code and Codex.
  • Pi recipe smoke tests added to scripts/test-recipes.sh.

Full changelog

compare v0.5.1...v0.5.2

item.title: v0.6.0
item.description:
New Features

  • Focus-muted notification queue. Configure it in Focus Behavior: Ignore Focus Modes, Mute for DND Only, or Mute for Any Focus Mode.
  • Nicer CLI options: standard long options like --timeout/--group, plus shorthands like -t/-g/-f.
  • notchify --daemon quit exits the daemon when the menubar icon is inaccessible.

Fixes

  • Single notifications no longer scroll or shift awkwardly.
  • Chip hover switching is smoother, especially when moving quickly between adjacent chips.
  • Muted notifications can be clicked to dismiss or run actions after they are revealed.
  • Restarting the daemon no longer leaves the notification socket unreachable.

Updating

If you are already on v0.5.2, use Check for Updates... from the Notchify menubar icon.

Fresh Install

Download Notchify-0.6.0.dmg, drag to Applications, then run xattr -d com.apple.quarantine /Applications/Notchify.app.

Full Changelog

sespiros/notchify@v0.5.2...v0.6.0
